channel.title: Downgrade on Shivanand Velmurugan — Product leader. Systems thinker.
channel.description: Recent content in Downgrade on Shivanand Velmurugan — Product leader. Systems thinker.

item.title: IPOD touch: Downgrade from 1.1.3 to 1.1.1
item.description:
My ipod touch was upgraded to 1.1.3, after connecting to my computer, and I wanted to downgrade to 1.1.1, so I could jailbreak it and put any app I want on it.

ipodtouchmaster found a way to downgrade it using iPhuc.
